series.curator_notes: Mixed formats: Main German Hörspiel series uses 'Folge XXX:' numbering (currently 200+ episodes). Also includes 'Quest for the Lost Powers' spinoff sub-series (4 books) and occasional 'Band XX' book-based entries. Action-themed content with martial arts and fantasy elements.
